mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id AS studentId, user_id AS userId, graduate_year AS graduateYear, destination, destination_detail AS destinationDetail, certificate_no AS certificateNo, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM graduate WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, student_id AS studentId, user_id AS userId, graduate_year AS graduateYear, destination, destination_detail AS destinationDetail, certificate_no AS certificateNo, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM graduate WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO graduate (student_id, user_id, graduate_year, destination, destination_detail, certificate_no) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{userId}, #{graduateYear}, #{destination}, #{destinationDetail}, #{certificateNo})
mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.student_id AS studentId, g.user_id AS userId, g.graduate_year AS graduateYear, g.destination, g.destination_detail AS destinationDetail, g.certificate_no AS certificateNo, s.student_no AS studentNo, up.name, c.college_name AS collegeName, m.major_name AS majorName, cl.class_name AS className, cl.grade, g.create_time AS createTime, g.update_time AS updateTime FROM graduate g LEFT JOIN student s ON g.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON g.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id ORDER BY g.graduate_year DESC, g.id ASC
SELECT g.destination, COUNT(*) AS count FROM graduate g GROUP BY g.destination ORDER BY g.destination ASC
SELECT g.graduate_year AS graduateYear, g.destination, COUNT(*) AS count FROM graduate g GROUP BY g.graduate_year, g.destination ORDER BY g.graduate_year DESC, g.destination ASC

SELECT c.college_name AS collegeName, g.destination, COUNT(*) AS count FROM graduate g LEFT JOIN student s ON g.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_id = c.id GROUP BY c.college_name, g.destination ORDER BY c.college_name ASC, g.destination ASC
